subcodes.title: Suriy-i-Burhan (not = Lawh-i-Burhan)
subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and that this Youth is His proof unto all who are in the heavens and on the earth, and His sovereign authority [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و ان هذا الغلام لبرهانه لمن فی السموات و الارض و سلطانه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power of the Manifestation of God
